missionContext.candidate: 7-rule 15m portfolio: ALL signals validated >60% WR across TWO independent 7-day windows. H1:15 DOWN (92.9% in-sample) was DROPPED — only 39.6% in May 2-9 cross-validation window. H12:30 UP and H12:15 UP are NEW additions replacing H6:15 DOWN and H12:00 UP.
missionContext.reasonLoaded: Previous 7-signal strategy used IN-SAMPLE WRs only. This v2 cross-validates against May 2-9 (window 1) and May 13-20 (window 2). Only 7 signals survive both windows with >58% WR in window2 and >65% WR in window1.
missionContext.validationMethod: Two-window cross-validation: Window1=May 2-9 2026, Window2=May 13-20 2026. Both windows independently computed from live Polymarket Gamma API resolved markets. Only signals with WR>=65% in window2 AND WR>=58% in window1 are included.

DROPPED_signals.H1:15_DOWN: 39.6% WR in May 2-9 (window1=only 92.9% in-sample, FAKE signal)

latestKnownStrictResults.mc_stress_7day: $30 median from $7.93, p10=$1, p90=$593, bust=7.02% (worst-case -10% WR + slippage)
latestKnownStrictResults.regime_change_warning: H12:30 UP and H12:15 UP are new additions from the May 13-20 window. Monitor their forward performance. If either drops below 55% over 14+ days, drop immediately. H12:30 has lower May 2-9 WR (58.3%) suggesting it is marginally stable.

missionContext.honestDisclaimer: These are cross-validated WRs from TWO independent windows. However, all Polymarket 15m crypto markets are subject to regime change. The stress scenario (median $30, 7% bust) represents the realistic 'what if WRs degrade' scenario. Do NOT treat median $954 as guaranteed. The previous strategy failure ($12.89 → $7.93 loss) happened because H19 M15 and H16 M0 were 36.9% combined WR in fresh data. This cross-validation specifically prevents that exact failure mode.
missionContext.addedTimesVerdict: 7 different time slots (H3:15, H7:15, H12:15, H12:30, H13:15, H13:30, H19:30) — all non-overlapping 15-min cycles. H12:15 UP and H12:30 UP fire 15 minutes apart (different cycles) — no conflict with MAX_GLOBAL_TRADES_PER_CYCLE=1.
missionContext.weatherMarketsVerdict: Checked active weather/temperature markets on Polymarket. These are high-price traps — winning outcomes trade at 90-99c giving <11% ROI. Cannot compound effectively. The 15m crypto UP/DOWN portfolio is the superior approach for rapid compounding.

depositAdvice.current_7.93usd: 7-day median $954 realistic. 14-day median not reliable due to regime change risk.
depositAdvice.deposit_plus_5gbp_14.23usd: 7-day median $1709 realistic (+79%), 14-day median $191k (+1236%). Higher bankroll reduces bust risk from 0.26% to 0.08%. RECOMMEND depositing if available.
